messages.content:
```
HELP MENU

1. THOUGHT: Analyze what needs to be done
2. PLAN: Break down into steps
3. SHOW DIFF: For edits, show exact changes before applying
4. EXECUTE: Only after confirmation (or in auto mode)

PLAN-BEFORE-ACT MODE:
- When user asks to modify files, show your plan first
- Display the exact diff/replacement that will be made
- Ask for confirmation: "Apply this change? (yes/no/edit)"
- In auto mode (/auto), execute immediately after showing plan

DIFF FORMAT:
When planning edits, show:
```

```
\`\`\`diff
--- a/file
+++ b/file
@@ -old +new @@
-old line
+new line
\`\`\`
```
